texto: You know, unrequited love is very difficut? It's not just having this one-sided love of someone who's far away. Being close, talking daily, liking a guy who's constantly near me is harder than it would be under different circumstances.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de So Hee Park que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “You know, unrequited love is very difficut? It's not just having this one-sided love of someone w…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, unrequited-love, unrequited, com foco em reflexao.
